prs.title: Add log-summary-generator: JSON log processing task
prs.body: ## Task: log-summary-generator This Harbor task processes a JSON log file and generates a summary containing: - Total log count - Log level counts (INFO, WARN, ERROR) - Unique user count ### Validation Results Oracle Agent Score: 1.0 ✅ NOP Agent Score: 0.0 ✅ ### Notes - Uses absolute paths (/app/...) - No hardcoded outputs - Verifier writes reward.txt correctly - Docker follows Harbor constraints ---

prs.title: Add OpenAI icon

labels.name: new icon
labels.description: Issues or pull requests for adding a new icon.

labels.name: permission required
labels.description: Contact trademark owner for permission to include this icon. Take no other action in the meantime.

prs.body:
**Issue:** closes #<ISSUE_NUMBER>

**Popularity metric:** Alexa Rank: ~20 (Global Top 50)

**Terms of Service link:** https://openai.com/brand

### Checklist

- [x] I have reviewed the [forbidden brands](https://github.com/simple-icons/simple-icons/blob/develop/CONTRIBUTING.md#forbidden-brands) list and confirm the brand I am submitting a PR for is not one of them, nor is it a subsidiary of one of those brands
- [x] I have reviewed the brand's terms of service, and am confident we can add this icon
- [x] I updated the JSON data in [data/simple-icons.json](cci:7://file:///Users/archismanchoudhury/Desktop/OSS/simple-icons/data/simple-icons.json:0:0-0:0)
- [x] I optimized the icon with SVGO or SVGOMG
- [x] The SVG `viewbox` is `0 0 24 24`

### Description

- **Hex:** `#000000` (Primary brand color)
- **Source:** [Wikimedia Commons](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:OpenAI_Logo.svg) (Matches official [Brand Guidelines](https://openai.com/brand))
- **Optimization:** Optimized with SVGO and manually scaled to fit the 24x24 viewbox.

prs.title: feat: Add comprehensive backend test suite with documentation
prs.body:
- Created complete test suite with Jest and Supertest
- Added unit tests for models (User, Activity) and controllers (Auth)
- Added integration tests for API endpoints (Auth, Activity routes)
- Set up MongoDB Memory Server for isolated testing
- Added test fixtures and proper test environment configuration
- Created comprehensive testing documentation (TESTING.md)
- Generated test results report (TEST_RESULTS.md)
- Achieved 96.7% test success rate (87/90 tests passing)
- Added test coverage reporting with HTML output
- Configured ES modules support for testing framework

prs.title: Add entry for Archisman Nath Choudhury
prs.body:
# Adding My Name to Git Gang

> **Note**: This template is only for adding your name to the contributors list. For other changes, issues, or updates to existing entries, please create an issue instead.

## What I did

I filled out the simple form in ADD_YOUR_NAME.md with my details.

## Checklist

- [x] I filled out Name, Username, and Message
- [x] This is my first contribution
- [x] I only modified ADD_YOUR_NAME.md
- [x] I starred this repository ⭐ (helps us reach more contributors!)

---

Our automation will validate your entry and merge this PR if everything looks good. Welcome to the Git Gang!

Resolves #102
